55:
I am Mikoto of House Jinba─a Doman, though my years in Sharlayan have made me a stranger here. You must be <Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>─fabled liberator of men. Slayer of false gods. Warrior of Light...
I thought you'd be taller.
